message:
🐛 Fix missing search input on mobile + add mobile CI tests (#31)

* 🐛 Add search input to mobile search page

The /search page had no text input on mobile — the SearchBar component
was wrapped in hidden md:block (desktop only). Mobile users tapping the
search icon were taken to /search with no way to type a query.

Added a SearchInput client component rendered on the search page itself,
with auto-focus, clear button, and form submission via router.push().

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add mobile CI smoke tests with Playwright

- Add .github/workflows/ci.yml with build-and-lint + mobile-smoke-test jobs
- Add Playwright config targeting Pixel 7 (Chromium mobile emulation)
- Add 7 mobile smoke tests: homepage, search, navigation, shop, species, cart, key pages
- Add @playwright/test as devDependency

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  build-and-lint:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    defaults:
+      run:
+        working-directory: apps/web
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 20
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: apps/web/package-lock.json
+
+      - run: npm ci
+      - run: npm run lint
+      - run: npm run build
+
+  mobile-smoke-test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    needs: build-and-lint
+    defaults:
+      run:
+        working-directory: apps/web
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 20
+          cache: npm
+          cache-dependency-path: apps/web/package-lock.json
+
+      - run: npm ci
+      - run: npx playwright install chromium --with-deps
+
+      - name: Mobile smoke tests
+        run: npx playwright test --config=playwright.mobile.config.ts

@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+import { defineConfig, devices } from "@playwright/test";
+
+export default defineConfig({
+  testDir: "./tests/mobile",
+  timeout: 30_000,
+  retries: 1,
+  webServer: {
+    command: "npm run build && npm run start",
+    port: 3000,
+    timeout: 120_000,
+    reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
+  },
+  projects: [
+    {
+      name: "Mobile Chrome",
+      use: { ...devices["Pixel 7"] },
+    },
+  ],
+});
